headline: 2 Reasons to Avoid VRSK and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, Verisk’s shares have sunk to $193.68, producing a disappointing 13.6% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 9.4% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
